customer_anxiety_profile: Low anxiety, high openness. Chris is a warm, cooperative lead with no prior solar experience and no competing quotes. His primary motivation is bill pain ('a doozy'). No skepticism signals, no scam concerns, no competing proposals.
unresolved_concerns: Chris asked about installer/employment opportunities at Ion — Owen promised to follow up but the route is unclear and the follow-through is the rep's responsibility, not the customer's.
Appointment format was never confirmed on the call — Owen said 'it might be a phone call' at 00:42 but never locked it. Closer should confirm format at the top of the appointment.
sensitive_topics_raised: Employment inquiry — Chris asked if Ion is hiring installers. This is a trust signal, not a complication, but the closer should be aware it was raised and not resolved.
exact_promises_rep_made: Owen promised to ask his manager about installer job openings and follow up with Chris.
Bill photo was sent to Owen's personal line — no Ion-system confirmation was given to Chris.
closer_should_know: Chris is a warm, uncontested lead with a brand-new roof (almost one year old), strong sun exposure, a high bill ('a doozy' in February), and a credit score of 830 — he is fully qualified and has no competing proposals. The bill-pain anchor was never built on the setter call; the closer has a clean opportunity to open with it. Confirm appointment format (phone vs. in-person) at the top of the call.
